Hi Melinda
As requested below are some clubs you can send to families,I have also sent you a video and details for our app,if you require anything further please let me know.
YOGA PROGRAMThis isn’t just yoga. This is breathing like a butterfly. Stretching like a cat. Roaring like a lion, then resting in the shade.
Mini Monstars Kids Yoga is a play-based incursion program designed for children aged 0–6 years. We use storytelling, imagination, and gentle movement to introduce the fundamentals of mindfulness, emotional regulation, and body awareness.

From nursery to kindergarten, every session is tailored to meet the developmental stage of your children; led by experienced instructors who understand how young bodies learn, move, and rest.

  A Journey, Not Just a Class.
We don’t teach poses. We teach presence.
Our incursions take children on an imaginative journey; through jungles, oceans, farms, and forests, using yoga as the vehicle. Along the way, children develop:

  Mindfulness
Simple breathing techniques and sensory awareness games
  Storytelling
Themed adventures where poses become characters
  Strength & Balance
Gentle poses that build core stability and coordination
  Self-Expression
Moving, creating, and leading poses in their own way
  Emotional Regulation
Recognising feelings and using breath to reset
  Connection
Partner poses and group circles that build trust
  Focus
Following sequences, listening cues, and sustained attention
  Rest
Guided relaxation, visualisation, and quiet time

 More Than Sensory Play.
